Windshield Replacement & Repair in Grand Forks

Auto glass repair — Rydell Auto Body and Glass.

At Rydell Auto Body and Glass we have an in-house glass technician which allows us to perform all of our windshield replacements and repairs right in our facility. Our glass technician is fully certified to make sure you are not only getting a quality repair but it will be safe for you and your passengers. Once we have either repaired or replaced your windshield we will give you our complimentary vehicle detail and as always we will work with your insurance company on your behalf or we will make sure you get the best price so make sure you give us a call as most windshields can be replaced within a day!

Windshield Replacement in Grand Forks

If you need your windshield replaced, call us before you file an insurance claim! In many cases, we can replace your windshield for less than your deductible and you won’t have to file a claim at all. If you do need to file a claim, let our knowledgeable staff assist you.

Glass Chip Repair

If you have a chip in your windshield from a small rock, it’s no reason to worry. Our specialists complete extensive training and use only the highest quality materials available to repair your windshield. That’s why the team at Rydell in Grand Forks puts a lifetime guarantee on our auto glass repair work. Our team will take care of your insurance claim, and make sure you ask any questions you may have about what needs to be done, so our windshield experts can put your mind at ease.

Here are some things to keep in mind when considering auto glass repair at Rydell Collision Center:

  • A quality windshield repair will restore the structural integrity of the windshield, will help prevent damage from spreading, and also make the blemish less noticeable without replacing the glass.
  • Most glass chips smaller than the size of a half dollar coin can be repaired along with small cracks 3/4 of an inch or smaller.
  • Most glass chip repairs can be completed in 60 minutes or less.
  • Cost of repair is only a fraction of the replacement cost.
  • If you have comprehensive coverage, most insurance companies will waive your deductible leaving no costs for you.

Give Rydell Collision Center a call today if you need a windshield replacement that will last a lifetime at 701-792-2846.
